conditions.condition: provider request and evidence schemas exist
conditions.evidence: runtime/schemas/api-provider-request-v1.schema.json and runtime/schemas/api-provider-evidence-v1.schema.json exist and passed JSON parsing.

conditions.condition: provider and credential source are pending human selection
conditions.evidence: api-provider-preflight.json records provider_selection.status and credential_source.status as pending_human_selection.
credential_source.secret_value_stored=false and the approval template requires a source reference rather than a value.

conditions.condition: hard cost ceilings and single paid-smoke limit are recorded
conditions.evidence: preflight records per_project_daily_usd=5, global_daily_usd=30, hard_block=true, and single_paid_smoke_max_usd=1.

conditions.condition: no network or paid provider call occurred
conditions.evidence: preflight execution flags network_call_made=false and real_provider_call_made=false.

recommendation: Gate P passes. The next step is a human-facing single paid-smoke approval proposal; no provider call is authorized until a human selects provider, credential source, model policy, and budget.
